rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same three material defects (two `True` placeholder fields and the `IsUnipotent` type mismatch). Review 1 additionally flags the content-free `unipotentRadical_trivial'` theorem (line 80) and the placeholder-dependent instance (line 78) as needing removal, which are real issues confirmed in the diff; acting on Review 1 leaves fewer dead stubs in the PR.
